calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Sep-18-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon for Petitioner.

Mr. Ferdon explained that the discrepancy in the amount on hand and what is shown in the accounting is a filing fee and acccrued interest. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Aug-13-2013 Continued To Aug-27-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jul-16-2013 Continued To Aug-13-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon for San Francisco Public Administrator.

Mr. Ferdon stated that Mr. Malone was not coming in today and that notice to the Attorney has always been acceptable. The Court informed Mr. Ferdon that it wants consents from Mr. Owens four Clients showing that notice may be given Mr. Owens. The accounting petition was continued to August 13, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)
